microsoft_ft: Drove complex technical engagements proving the value of Azure resilience solutions to enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), tying business problems to technical solutions to sustain 45+ annual drills and **$14M+ business impact**.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new model for continuous validation across the lifecycle.

Served as technical bridge lead on a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, debugging failures live with customer teams and conveying complex requirements between executive, business, and engineering stakeholders.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows using LLM-powered automation, reducing planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% while presenting outcomes to executive audiences and partner teams.

Articulated technology value propositions at executive, business, and technical levels, delivering demos and recovery readouts under executive visibility across 14 cross-org executions that steered enterprise customers toward expanded commitments.

Influenced the roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, conveying customer requirements directly to engineering to close critical infrastructure-automation feature gaps.

Optimized data retrieval by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by **83%** and improving developer self-service across cloud service teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering teams.

Mobilized a strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical infrastructure paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support against measurable cloud delivery outcomes.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process in a DevOps-driven environment.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and proving the value of infrastructure automation to stakeholders.
